description_long: This is a tall, slender ceramic vase with a single curved handle and a flared mouth, reminiscent of ancient Greek lekythos vessels. The body is primarily a warm terracotta color, adorned with black-figure painted scenes depicting armored warriors in combat, with intricate details on their shields and attire. The neck and rim are dark, contrasting with the lighter, cream-colored upper section that features a radiating black line motif. The base is circular and sturdy, also finished in a dark glaze. The handle is attached from the shoulder to just below the rim, showing some wear and patina. The overall craftsmanship and decorative motifs suggest a classical, historical aesthetic suitable for display in refined urban environments.
description: A tall, slender terracotta vase with a single handle, black-figure warrior scenes, and a flared dark rim. Classical Greek-style ornamentation and detailed painted motifs enhance its elegant form.
description_view_0: This view highlights the handle and a side profile of a warrior with a shield, showing the detailed painted scene and the flared rim.
description_view_1: The front view displays the main painted battle scene with two warriors in combat, offering the clearest look at the decorative motifs.
description_view_2: This angle shows the opposite side of the handle, with a partial figure and more of the plain terracotta surface visible.
description_view_3: The rear view reveals the unadorned back of the vase, with the handle and simple banded decoration near the base.
attribute_pattern: figural battle scenes with geometric accents
